posts.title: Why Indian Skin Needs a Different Routine Than What Western Brands Prescribe
posts.excerpt: Melanin-rich skin has unique needs that most global skincare brands ignore. Foxtale's dermatology team analyzed 1.8M Indian skin profiles to build routines that actually work for our climate and skin type.

posts.title: Kojic Acid vs Alpha Arbutin: Which Brightening Ingredient Actually Works on Dark Spots?
posts.excerpt: Both are everywhere in 2026. Only one is backed by clinical data for hyperpigmentation on deeper skin tones. We break down the science so you stop guessing.

posts.title: Your Moisturiser Is Too Heavy for Indian Summer — Here's What to Switch To
posts.excerpt: When ambient humidity crosses 70%, your skin barrier behaves completely differently. Most people are over-moisturising and causing the very breakouts they're trying to prevent.

posts.title: The Real Reason Indians Don't Wear Sunscreen — And How Foxtale Fixed It
posts.excerpt: White cast, greasy finish, and pill-balling under makeup. We ran 3 years of consumer research to understand exactly why sunscreen adoption is low in India — and built around every single objection.

posts.title: Hormonal Acne in Your 20s and 30s Is Surging in India — Here's the Data
posts.excerpt: Dermatologist visits for adult acne are up 58% in tier-1 Indian cities. Stress, diet, and pollution are compounding. We explain what's driving it and what actually clears it.

posts.title: The 3-Step Foxtale Routine That Works for 90% of Indian Skin Types
posts.excerpt: Stop layering 9 products. Our clinical team distilled thousands of successful skin transformations into one repeatable framework — cleanser, treatment, protect. Here's exactly how to execute it.
